title: Repository Configuration Schema
description: JSON Schema for the .github/workflows/aw.json repository-level configuration file for gh-aw agentic workflows

maintenance.description: Configuration for the agentic-maintenance workflow. Set to false to disable maintenance entirely, or provide an object to configure it.

oneOf.description: Set to false to disable agentic maintenance and refuse features that rely on it (such as expires).
Agentic maintenance workflow configuration. Enables generation of agentics-maintenance.yml.

runs_on.description: The runner or runners to use for maintenance workflow jobs. Accepts a single label string or an array of labels.

oneOf.description: A single runner label for maintenance workflow jobs.
An array of runner labels for maintenance workflow jobs.

action_failure_issue_expires.description: Expiration time in hours for action failure issues opened by the conclusion job. Defaults to 168 (7 days).
